description: Build second batch of massive knowledge base files (target: ~3GB more). Covers specialized technical domains, practical knowledge, and comprehensive reference data to push total knowledge toward 6GB+.
steps: Create knowledge/massive/algorithms_detailed.mk - 3000+ lines covering every major algorithm with pseudocode descriptions: sorting (quicksort, mergesort, heapsort, radixsort, timsort with step-by-step), searching (binary search, interpolation, exponential), graph algorithms (Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford, Floyd-Warshall, Kruskal, Prim, topological sort, strongly connected components, maximum flow, bipartite matching), dynamic programming (knapsack, LCS, edit distance, matrix chain, coin change, LIS, all variants), string algorithms (KMP, Rabin-Karp, suffix arrays, Aho-Corasick, regex), geometric algorithms, randomized algorithms, approximation algorithms.

Create knowledge/massive/system_design_patterns.mk - 3000+ lines: microservices patterns (saga, CQRS, event sourcing, service mesh), distributed systems (Raft, Paxos, two-phase commit, vector clocks), scalability (sharding strategies, caching layers, CDN design), reliability (circuit breaker, bulkhead, retry with backoff), messaging (Kafka internals, RabbitMQ, NATS), databases at scale (partitioning, replication, consistency models), real-world system designs (URL shortener, chat system, news feed, search engine, video streaming, ride sharing, payment system).

Create knowledge/massive/devops_infrastructure.mk - 3000+ lines: Docker (multi-stage builds, networking, volumes, compose, swarm), Kubernetes (pods, services, deployments, statefulsets, operators, CRDs, helm charts, istio), CI/CD (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins pipelines, ArgoCD), monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry), cloud (AWS services in detail, GCP, Azure), terraform (providers, modules, state, workspaces), networking (VPC, subnets, security groups, load balancers, DNS).

Create knowledge/massive/security_comprehensive.mk - 3000+ lines: cryptography (symmetric/asymmetric, AES, RSA, ECC, hash functions, digital signatures, PKI, TLS handshake, perfect forward secrecy), web security (OWASP Top 10, XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, SSRF, XXE, auth vulnerabilities), network security (firewalls, IDS/IPS, VPN, zero trust), application security (SAST, DAST, SCA, secrets management), incident response, compliance (SOC2, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, GDPR), penetration testing methodology, malware analysis.

Create knowledge/massive/api_design.mk - 3000+ lines: REST (resource naming, versioning, pagination, filtering, HATEOAS, error handling), GraphQL (schema design, resolvers, mutations, subscriptions, federation, dataloader), gRPC (protobuf design, streaming, interceptors, load balancing), WebSocket (protocol, scaling, heartbeat, reconnection), API gateway patterns, rate limiting algorithms, authentication (OAuth2 flows, OIDC, API keys, JWT best practices), documentation (OpenAPI, AsyncAPI), testing (contract testing, Pact, load testing).

Create knowledge/massive/databases_deep.mk - 3000+ lines: relational (normalization forms, query optimization, indexing strategies, transactions, MVCC, connection pooling, replication), PostgreSQL (internals, extensions, JSONB, full-text search, partitioning), MySQL (InnoDB, replication, performance tuning), NoSQL (MongoDB aggregation, Redis data structures, Cassandra, DynamoDB, Neo4j Cypher), time-series (InfluxDB, TimescaleDB), search (Elasticsearch, Lucene internals), data warehousing (columnar storage, OLAP, star schema, snowflake schema).

Create knowledge/massive/machine_learning.mk - 3000+ lines: supervised learning (linear/logistic regression, SVM, decision trees, random forests, gradient boosting, XGBoost), unsupervised (k-means, DBSCAN, hierarchical clustering, PCA, t-SNE, autoencoders), deep learning (CNNs, RNNs, LSTMs, transformers, attention mechanism, GANs, diffusion models, VAEs), NLP (tokenization, embeddings, word2vec, BERT, GPT architecture, fine-tuning, RLHF, prompt engineering), computer vision (object detection, segmentation, tracking), reinforcement learning (Q-learning, policy gradient, PPO, MCTS), MLOps (experiment tracking, model serving, feature stores, A/B testing).

Create knowledge/massive/web_development.mk - 3000+ lines: HTML5 (semantic elements, accessibility, forms, canvas, web components), CSS3 (flexbox, grid, animations, custom properties, container queries, cascade layers), React (hooks in depth, context, suspense, server components, concurrent features), Next.js (app router, server actions, middleware, ISR), Vue (composition API, Pinia, Nuxt), Angular (signals, standalone components, RxJS), Svelte (runes, SvelteKit), state management, testing (unit, integration, E2E), performance (Core Web Vitals, lazy loading, code splitting, service workers).

Create knowledge/massive/practical_knowledge.mk - 3000+ lines: cooking (recipes, techniques, food safety, nutrition facts, ingredient substitutions), health (exercise types, nutrition guidelines, sleep hygiene, mental health), finance (budgeting, investing basics, compound interest, tax concepts, retirement planning), home (repairs, maintenance, gardening, cleaning), travel (packing, navigation, cultural etiquette), communication (writing emails, presentations, negotiations), productivity (time management, goal setting, habit formation), learning techniques (spaced repetition, active recall, Feynman technique).

Create knowledge/massive/engineering_electrical.mk - 3000+ lines: circuit analysis (Kirchhoff's laws, Thevenin/Norton, superposition, mesh/nodal analysis), electronics (op-amps, transistors, logic gates, flip-flops, counters, ADC/DAC), digital design (combinational/sequential circuits, FSMs, FPGA, Verilog/VHDL basics), signals (Fourier transform, Laplace transform, z-transform, filters, sampling theorem), communications (modulation, encoding, error correction, antenna theory), power systems (generation, transmission, transformers, motors), embedded systems (microcontrollers, RTOS, I2C, SPI, UART, CAN bus).

Create knowledge/massive/engineering_mechanical.mk - 3000+ lines: statics (forces, moments, equilibrium, trusses), dynamics (kinematics, kinetics, work-energy, impulse-momentum), materials science (stress-strain, failure theories, fatigue, composites), thermodynamics (cycles, engines, refrigeration, heat exchangers), fluid mechanics (Bernoulli, pipe flow, boundary layer, drag, lift), manufacturing (machining, casting, welding, 3D printing), robotics (kinematics, dynamics, control, path planning, actuators, sensors), automotive (engine types, transmission, suspension, aerodynamics).

Create knowledge/massive/mathematics_applied.mk - 3000+ lines: numerical methods (root finding, interpolation, numerical integration, ODE solvers, PDE methods, optimization), linear algebra applications (SVD, eigendecomposition, least squares, PCA, matrix factorizations), statistics (hypothesis testing, regression, ANOVA, Bayesian inference, time series, survival analysis), optimization (linear programming, convex optimization, genetic algorithms, simulated annealing, gradient descent variants), information theory (entropy, mutual information, channel capacity, compression), game theory (Nash equilibrium, minimax, mechanism design).

Create knowledge/massive/language_linguistics.mk - 3000+ lines: phonetics (IPA, articulatory/acoustic phonetics), morphology (inflection, derivation, compounding), syntax (phrase structure, transformational grammar, dependency), semantics (formal semantics, pragmatics, speech acts), historical linguistics (language families, sound changes, reconstruction), sociolinguistics, psycholinguistics, computational linguistics (NLP techniques, parsing algorithms, word embeddings), writing systems, major world languages (grammar summaries).

Create knowledge/massive/philosophy_ethics.mk - 3000+ lines: ethics (metaethics, normative ethics, applied ethics, trolley problems, AI ethics), epistemology (justified true belief, skepticism, internalism/externalism, Gettier problems), metaphysics (causation, free will, personal identity, possible worlds, philosophy of mind), logic (propositional, predicate, modal, temporal, fuzzy, paraconsistent), philosophy of science (demarcation, theory change, scientific realism), political philosophy (justice, rights, liberty, democracy, social contract), aesthetics, philosophy of language (reference, meaning, speech acts).

Create knowledge/massive/space_exploration.mk - 2000+ lines: space missions (Apollo, Voyager, Mars rovers, ISS, James Webb, Artemis), rocket science (propulsion, orbital mechanics, staging, reentry), planets (detailed facts about all solar system bodies), exoplanets (detection methods, habitable zones, notable discoveries), space agencies (NASA, ESA, JAXA, SpaceX, Blue Origin), future missions, space technology (life support, radiation shielding, ion drives), astrobiology.
acceptance_criteria: Each file contains at least 2000 lines of well-formatted facts
Combined with FEAT-003 files, knowledge/massive/ total is at least 4GB
Facts are organized with section headers
All facts use proper source|relation|target|weight format
make all still compiles without errors
verification: Run 'wc -l knowledge/massive/*.mk' to confirm line counts
Run 'du -sh knowledge/massive/' to confirm size target
Run 'make all' to confirm build still works
